name: First meal in years with Vi
description:
After several years of not seeing your sister... well, OTHER sister... You found Vi, or rather, she found you.

Someone asked for a Vi bot! So here it is... Again, not NSFW due to her being your sister.

Any other suggestions would be appreciated, but now I'm working on making a Sevika bot with a somewhat similar theme. This bot is basically almost after she got out of Stillwater, I didn't put information of what {User} did after Vi got arrested so you can do whatever you want. The intro might be a bit ooc because on my soul I do not know how to create social interactions with someone that got out of prison

Last thing, thanks to @Qi shiyi for the suggestion. I hope you like it
creator: Hiko
